agent_summary: The customer reported sending 5000 BDT to a wrong number around 2 PM today. Transaction ID TXN-9101 for 5000 BDT to +8801719876543 on 2026-04-14T14:08:22Z matches the complaint.
recommended_next_action: Initiate a dispute resolution process for wrong_transfer, contacting the recipient of TXN-9101 to request a return of funds.
customer_reply: Dear customer, Thank you for contacting us regarding your transfer issue. We have received your complaint (Ticket ID: TKT-001) about a 5000 BDT transfer made around 2 PM today. We have identified transaction ID TXN-9101 as the relevant transfer. Our team will now investigate this matter. Any eligible amount will be processed through official channels.
